Field.tooltip: WSS (recommended): Secure WebSocket on port 4243 with API token. Legacy TCP: Unsecured port 4242, no auth.
Field.Label: Connection mode:

Field.tooltip: Generate in Heatmiser Neo App: Settings > Api Access > Tokens.
Field.Label: API Token:

Field.tooltip: Uncheck for original NeoHub (Gen 1). Gen 2 uses newer API commands over legacy TCP.
Field.Label: NeoHub Gen 2 (newer hardware):

Field.tooltip: Check to synchronise Neo time with Indigo once per day
Field.Label: Synchronise Neo time with Indigo:

Field.tooltip: Check to copy Neo comms to Indigo Event Log
Field.Label: Copy Neo comms to Indigo Event Log:
